The US is increasing pressure on Havana, citing economic hardship and past incidents, though Trump downplays fears of direct military action.

title: IPL 2026 scripts history! KKR’s win over Mumbai Indians sets an all-time record

Kolkata Knight Riders' victory over Mumbai Indians cemented this achievement, highlighting a significant trend favoring teams batting second. This shift has sparked discussions about potential disadvantages for first-batting sides in the league.

title: Iran-Israel war LIVE: Iran weighs U.S. offer as Trump says peace talks on 'borderline'
description: Iran warned on Wednesday, May 20, that war in West Asia would spread far beyond the region if the United States and Israel resumed their attacks after President Donald Trump threatened to strike again unless a deal is reached.

title: Vande Mataram now compulsory in Bengal madrassas: Suvendu govt passes new order
description: West Bengal's school education department has mandated the singing of 'Vande Mataram' during morning assemblies in state-run schools and madrassas, effective immediately. This directive follows a Union home ministry call to mark 150 years of the national song. Schools are seeking clarification on whether the state song will continue alongside 'Vande Mataram' and the National Anthem.

title: Heatwave alert for Delhi, UP, Punjab, Haryana and more: What to expect over next 5 days
description: Northwest India is battling severe heatwave conditions, with temperatures soaring across multiple states. Uttar Pradesh's Banda recorded a scorching 48°C, while Delhi anticipates touching 46°C. Punjab and Haryana are also reeling under intense heat. The IMD has issued alerts, advising extreme caution for vulnerable populations and recommending hydration and protective measures.

description: When policing takes the majority of funding for justice systems, it brings to light an architecture which is structured primarily around enforcement and surveillance

title: When God has to fix your film | Karuppu - Deus Ex Machina Explained | FMM 21
description:
In this episode of Frequently Made Mistakes, we break down: Why Deus Ex Machina often feels like cheating,
When divine intervention actually works, How movies like Bruce Almighty, Liar Liar and OMG – Oh My God! make the device work, and why Karuppu creates such divided reactions.

description: India has strongly criticized Pakistan at the UN Security Council, accusing it of a long record of violence against civilians and citing recent incidents in Afghanistan linked to Pakistani military action. India's envoy highlighted UNAMA findings of civilian casualties due to cross-border violence and airstrikes, including an attack on a hospital during Ramadan.

title: BCCI worried whether Rohit Sharma can stay fit till 2027 ODI World Cup
description: As the ODI World Cup approaches, concerns are rising regarding Rohit Sharma and Hardik Pandya's physical condition. Despite their inclusion in the Afghanistan series, the BCCI is wary of their effectiveness in the 50-over game. The selectors are urgently seeking information on Rohit's overall fitness and Hardik's bowling readiness, emphasizing the necessity for backup opening batsmen.

title: Voting begins for re-polling in Falta Assembly seat in West Bengal
description: Polling for the Falta Assembly seat was held in the second phase of the West Bengal Assembly elections on April 29; after large-scale irregularities were reported, the Election Commission ordered re-polling in the constituency on May 21.

title: Delhi-NCR taxi and auto unions begin 3-day strike: All you need to know
description: Commercial vehicle drivers in Delhi-NCR launched a three-day strike demanding fare hikes due to soaring fuel costs. Unions cite financial struggles, urging immediate government action on taxi and auto fares. However, several transport associations have distanced themselves, vowing to continue services and emphasizing national interest amidst global price challenges.

title: US billionaire does not agree with doomers who believe AI will take away jobs
description: Tech giants like Meta, Cisco, and Intuit are implementing significant layoffs, sparking widespread debate about AI's impact on jobs. While some predict mass unemployment, billionaire Mark Cuban argues AI will transform, not eliminate, entry-level roles. He believes the high cost of AI implementation and human decision-making capabilities will ensure continued employment opportunities.

title: Defeat of delimitation Bill is south India’s loss: Nara Lokesh
description: The vote against Constitution (131st Amendment) Bill has placed southern States at a disadvantage — Tamil Nadu, Kerala, Telangana and Andhra Pradesh stand to lose representation after the next Census, Telugu Desam Party’s newly appointed working president says, blaming politics, not policy for the Bill’s failure; he addresses concerns over upcoming resource-intensive data centres and explains why his government is incentivising larger families

The comment quickly spread across social media and sparked fresh discussion around the Rams coach’s early career in Washington. While neither McVay nor Russini addressed the rumor publicly, the story gained attention across NFL circles. The buzz also arrived during a busy offseason for McVay as he prepares the Rams for the 2026 season following recent comments about Jared Goff, Matthew Stafford and his biggest coaching regrets.

Brent crude reached $105.83 and WTI $99.23, recovering from a sharp decline after US-Iran negotiation reports. Tensions around the Strait of Hormuz persist, impacting global shipments and forcing nations to tap reserves.

description: Despite gifting $7.1 billion in 2025, MacKenzie Scott was excluded from the Chronicle of Philanthropy's top donor list. Scott prioritizes private, impactful giving over public recognition.

Jeff Bezos favored to buy Seahawks from Microsoft co-founder’s estate
description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos is projected as the leading buyer for the Seattle Seahawks. The NFL team was owned by late former Microsoft co-founder Paul Allen. After his passing in 2018, it is now managed by her sister Jody Allen under the Paul G. Allen Trust. It is now officially up for sale. Jeff Bezos has shown interest in owning a local NFL franchise for over seven years. The sale process is expected to conclude by the 2026 offseason.

title: Ronda Rousey’s net worth 2026: Earnings, endorsements and lifestyle
description: Ronda Rousey, a trailblazer in combat sports, is projected to have a net worth of nearly $14 million by 2026. Her fortune stems from lucrative UFC and WWE careers, acting, endorsements, and book sales. Rousey's impact on women's MMA and her transition to WWE cemented her status as a crossover star, ensuring her continued relevance and earning potential.
